name: privacy-design-plan
description: Agentic privacy design planner: brief → plan from knowledge → architecture + risk register + phased roadmap — not legal advice

steps.text: Planner role first. Use knowledge/privacy maps as evidence. Not legal advice; not a DPIA.

steps.prompt: Using skill privacy-host-map, briefly summarize existing knowledge/privacy/* host maps (AKL libraries, UoA Eloqua if present) as evidence inputs for a design planner. LOAD/CONFIG/CLICK/BUNDLE only where known. Not legal advice.

steps.goal: Using skill privacy-design-planner and knowledge/privacy/DESIGN_PLANNER.md plus any host maps, produce a full privacy design plan for a privacy-aware agentic AI that can (1) map third-party hosts from HTML and (2) plan reviews without claiming legal compliance. Include purpose, data inventory for the agent, trust boundaries, agent loop, HITL gates, risk register, P0-P3 phases, verification plan, and first engineer cycle. Cite local knowledge files.
criteria: Processors first- vs third-party for the agent and for example sites
Phased plan P0-P3 with exit criteria
Artifact paths under knowledge/privacy or workflows specified

steps.action: Acknowledge plan is design-only; not legal advice or production approval
steps.detail: Human confirms before any real-world data processing changes.
